title: galium vernum subsp. alpinum
intro: Galium vernum subsp. alpinum, also known as Alpline Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally used for its medicinal properties, Alpline Bedstraw has been valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. Alpline Bedstraw can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine for its therapeutic potential.
